persona.name: Marko Novak
persona.household: Lives with partner in a 2-bedroom apartment (Bezigrad). One car. Works in IT, moderate home usage, watches mostly streaming series, no live sport.
persona.profileNotes: Signed most contracts years ago and never revisited them. Pays by direct debit, rarely reads the itemised bills. Classic 'set and forget' consumer the advisor is built to help.

currentSubscriptions.planName: A1 Xplore TV maxi+ (fiber internet + TV)
currentSubscriptions.note: Fixed fiber broadband + Xplore TV maxi+ (~180 channels). Reasonable for a 2-person household; kept as-is. Real retail price: 55.99/mo promo (70.99 regular), 24-mo commitment.
currentSubscriptions.grounding: telco/retail_prices.json A1 'Xplore TV maxi+' 55.99 promo / 70.99 regular; telco/fix_packages.json operator=A1 tier='Xplore TV maxi+' (level 3, baseTvSchemeId 8)

currentSubscriptions.planName: A1 Arena Sport Premium (TV channel add-on)
currentSubscriptions.note: GOTCHA: pays 4.99/mo for the Arena Sport Premium TV package but never watches sport. Pure dead spend. Advisor should flag it for immediate removal (~60 EUR/yr saved, zero downside).
currentSubscriptions.grounding: telco/tv_schemes.json operatorId=3 (A1) name='Arena Sport Premium' isAddon=1 addonPriceEur=4.99

currentSubscriptions.note: GOTCHA: top-tier mobile plan with 500 GB data; Marko actually uses ~12-15 GB/mo on WiFi most of the day. A1 MidiMIO (200 GB, 20.98) or even a HOT/BOB MVNO unlimited plan (~6-10) covers him for less. Over-provisioned by a wide margin.
currentSubscriptions.grounding: telco/mobile_packages.json operator=A1 level=3 'MaksiMIO' dataGB=500 priceEur=27.99; cheaper: MidiMIO 20.98 (200GB); MVNO: telco/telco_mvno.json HOT MEGA 9.99 / BOB rumeni 9.99 (promo 5.99)

currentSubscriptions.note: GOTCHA-LITE: on Petrol's standard variable tariff (VT 0.12795 EUR/kWh). Petrol's OWN 1-year fixed promo (Akcijski cenik, VT 0.11795) is ~1 cent/kWh cheaper and price-locked; other suppliers' promos (Energetika Ljubljana Akcija VT 0.1194) are similar. A same-supplier or switch saves a few EUR/mo with no service change. Illustrative monthly bill (energy + network + levies + 22% VAT) for a ~250 kWh/mo apartment.
currentSubscriptions.grounding: energy.json Petrol 'Redni cenik' VT 0.12795 vs Petrol 'Akcijski cenik (promo, fixed 1yr)' VT 0.11795

currentSubscriptions.note: BIGGEST GOTCHA: Marko believes he still pays Vzajemna ~35/mo for dopolnilno zdravstveno zavarovanje. That product was ABOLISHED 31 Dec 2023 and replaced 1 Jan 2024 by the compulsory state OZP (obvezni zdravstveni prispevek, ~39.36/mo since March 2026, collected via ZZZS/payroll). If a 35/mo Vzajemna charge is still hitting his account it is either a stale legacy line or a NEW discretionary private health rider he did not realise he opted into. Advisor must surface this: he is likely paying the state OZP AND this line. Verify and cancel if redundant.
currentSubscriptions.grounding: insurance.json marketNote + Vzajemna 'Dopolnilno zdravstveno zavarovanje (LEGACY - abolished)' premiumNote/notes (DEMO-CRITICAL)

currentSubscriptions.note: Legally mandatory car liability (AO). Kept as-is; this is a 'leave it alone' item that gives the advisor a contrast against the redundant/wasteful lines. ~300 EUR/yr paid monthly is typical for a mid-size car and Marko's bonus-malus class.
currentSubscriptions.grounding: insurance.json Triglav 'Avtomobilsko zavarovanje' AO (Legally mandatory liability, typical ~200-450 EUR/yr profile-dependent)

currentSubscriptions.note: Municipal monopoly tied to the address. Cannot be switched or shopped. Advisor shows this as INFO-ONLY: explain the bill line items (vodarina, omreznina, odvajanje/kanalscina, ciscenje, okoljska dajatev), never present it as a savings opportunity. Illustrative single-household water+sewage figure.
currentSubscriptions.grounding: water.json JP VOKA Snaga (Ljubljana), isCompetitive=false, canSwitchProvider=false

riggedReveals.insight: Paid sport TV add-on, never watches sport. Cancel outright, zero downside.
Uses ~12-15 GB but pays for 500 GB. Right-size the plan.
Product abolished 2024, replaced by compulsory state OZP. Likely a redundant/legacy charge stacked on top of the OZP he already pays. Biggest single reveal in the dataset.

_meta.purpose: Rigged so the anti-upsell advisor lands 3 clear wins (unused add-on, over-provisioned mobile, redundant abolished insurance) plus one soft energy-tariff nudge, while water and car AO are correctly left alone.
_meta.grounding: All provider/plan names, tiers and unit prices reference the real grounding corpus in this folder; monthlyEur figures for bundles/bills without a public monthly price are illustrative and flagged as such.
